generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind the gearbox of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current I_M for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentIMDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance CurrentIMDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredCurrentIM : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current I_M from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentIMDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor position angle from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearbox position angle from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity of motor from position encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearboxAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity of gearwheel from secondary encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque of motor from current sensor and position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentIMDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor torque from Coulomb-Viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentIMDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearboxAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity of gearwheel from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentIMDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted, GearboxEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance SysML_BDD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysML_IBD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for describing the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for systems engineering modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for asset metadata"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated data display"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction (static, kinetic, viscous) using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParameterIdentificationInsight, DeviationAnalysisInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of simulated versus measured data in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataComparisonInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction model integration for robot control"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlAdjustmentInsight
]

instance FrictionModelParameterIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameter identification from measured and simulated data"
]

instance DeviationAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deviation analysis between simulated and measured data for friction model accuracy"
]

instance MotionControlAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights delivered to external control systems for motion accuracy improvement"
]

instance RealTimeDataComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time comparison of simulated versus measured data for visualization"
]

instance MABIMAX100_FirstAxis_Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, CurrentSensor, SysML_BDD_Model, SysML_IBD_Model, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, AssetAdministrationShell, SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler, MQTTEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing, with live measurements from sensors continuously integrated into the digital shadow for immediate model refinement and visualization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, AAS metadata, MQTT-streamed sensor data, processing components for model execution, and dashboard visualization, forming a purpose-driven reference model (DSRM) with traceable data origins."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, utilizing live operational data during robot motion control for continuous friction model refinement and accuracy improvement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated versus measured data traces, traceability of data generation via Processing components, and multi-physics-aware modeling combining white-box and black-box approaches for friction identification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (current, position) from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling; no specific standard numbers or industry frameworks mentioned."
]
